caption: A man with a beard wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands near clothing racks, and numerous framed pictures adorn the wall behind him. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the bottom left that says "DREAM" and another on the bottom right that says "DREAM TV". Across the sequence, the man is talking and smiling, shifting his facial expressions and slightly tilting his head from side to side while maintaining his seated position.
